→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: FAIL

Kender — Unarmored Caster casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Kender — Unarmored Caster for 9. HP: 33/67
=== ROUND 2 ===
Young Red Dragon is incapacitated — skipping turn.
--- Kender — Unarmored Caster's turn ---
Kender — Unarmored Caster casts Dissonant Whispers (1st level)
→ Young Red Dragon WIS save: [15 vs DC 16] FAIL!
→ 12 damage.
→ Young Red Dragon takes damage — Hypnotic Pattern charm breaks!
→ Young Red Dragon gains: must_use_reaction_to_move_away
Kender — Unarmored Caster casts Healing Word (1st level)
→ Heals Kender — Unarmored Caster for 7. HP: 40/67
=== ROUND 3 ===
--- Young Red Dragon's turn ---
Young Red Dragon attack 1: [d20:20+10=30 vs AC 15] CRITICAL HIT! 31 damage. Kender — Unarmored Caster HP: 9/67
→ Kender — Unarmored Caster loses concentration on Hypnotic Pattern
Young Red Dragon attack 2: [d20:14+10=24 vs AC 15] HIT! 19 damage. Kender — Unarmored Caster HP: 0/67
=== ENCOUNTER ENDED — Winner: ENEMY after 3 rounds ===
